reviews.comment:
Hoy 20/4/22 fui a cargar infinia diésel y no tenían. Igual que en la estación de Gra. Villegas. Soy socio y esas sorpresas no me gustan para nada.

(Translated by Google)
Today, April 20, 2022, I went to fill up with Infinia diesel and they didn't have any. The same thing happened at the Gra. Villegas station. I'm a member and I don't like these kinds of surprises at all.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyenU2WWtRRRAB

reviews.comment:
El bombero, era un poco prepotente, por lo demás,  bien.

(Translated by Google)
The firefighter was a bit arrogant, but otherwise, he was fine.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyMnN2Yll3EAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, ubicación estrategica
Le falta más personal a la  estación , la chica que atiende en la tienda no da abasto

(Translated by Google)
Good service, strategic location. However, the station needs more staff; the girl working in the shop is overwhelmed.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyNnBxbmt3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Hermoso lugar.
Dispone de un parque. Ideal para hacer un alto en el camino.
Lástima que no hay un retome en la autopista.

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful place.
It has a park. Ideal for a stop along the way.
It's a shame there's no U-turn on the highway.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyc0xyV21BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Todo muy bien

(Translated by Google)
Everything was great.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMya0tDOUR3EAE

reviews.comment:
Zona de descanso muy apropiada para relajarse antes de continuar viaje.

(Translated by Google)
A rest area that's perfect for relaxing before continuing your journey.

reviews.comment:
Instalaciones muy limpias, lugares para descansar, parrillas y parque juegos para niños amplio

(Translated by Google)
Very clean facilities, places to rest, grills and a large children's playground
